# Demo disk image

`demo-disk.dd` is a synthetic 4 KiB raw image for Trareon Lab onboarding.

Known signatures (approximate offsets):

| Offset | Type |
|--------|------|
| 64 | JPEG |
| 200 | PDF |
| 400 | GIF |
| 600 | ZIP |
| 900 | 7z |

Use **Load demo case** from Case Home / command palette. Labelled `DEMO ·` — lab use only, not court-ready.
